page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  No Added Ingredients   This juice is free from any added sugars or artificial flavors, making it a healthy choice for those seeking a natural drink.    Ideal for Refreshment   Perfect for hot summer days, this juice offers a cool and refreshing beverage that revitalizes your body and mind.    Sweet and Refreshing   Enjoy a sweet and refreshing drink that quenches your thirst, thanks to the pure and natural ingredients used in its production.    Convenient Packaging   The convenient packaging makes it easy to carry and enjoy your favorite drink anytime, anywhere.    NFC Technology   Utilizing NFC (Naturally Fermented Craft) technology, this juice retains all the natural goodness and flavor of fresh watermelon.     </body></html>

13750250709.title: NFC No Added Sugar Chilled Watermelon Juice Beverage
13750250709.detail_text: NFC Technology Utilizing NFC (Naturally Fermented Craft) technology, this juice retains its natural sweetness without any artificial additives. Authentic Flavor Experience the authentic taste of ice-cold watermelon juice, crafted to perfection for a refreshing beverage experience. Zero Additives This juice is free from any artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives, ensuring a pure and healthy drinking experience. page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  NFC Technology   Utilizing NFC (Naturally Fermented Craft) technology, this juice retains its natural sweetness without any artificial additives.    Authentic Flavor   Experience the authentic taste of ice-cold watermelon juice, crafted to perfection for a refreshing beverage experience.    Zero Additives   This juice is free from any artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives, ensuring a pure and healthy drinking experience.    Convenient Packaging   The convenient packaging makes it easy to carry and consume on the go, perfect for picnics, parties, or a quick snack.    Pure Fruit Juice   Enjoy the purity of this fruit juice, made from fresh watermelon, offering a natural and healthy choice for your drink needs.     </body></html>
